vlm.change_evidence: Structural deformation and collapse visible in after image compared to before. Roof and wall sections appear displaced or missing. Building footprint remains intact but internal structure is compromised.
vlm.before_observation: Building appears intact with defined roof and walls. No visible damage or structural displacement.
vlm.after_observation: Significant structural damage observed: roof appears partially collapsed or displaced, walls show deformation, and debris is visible. Building footprint remains but internal structure is compromised.
vlm.image_alignment: Aligned, same centroid and footprint outline visible in both images.
vlm.image_quality: Moderate quality, both images are slightly pixelated and have low contrast, but key structural changes are discernible.
vlm.uncertainty_reason: Low resolution and pixelation may obscure finer details of damage, but major structural changes are clearly visible.
